title: Model a Rust parse result
description: Complete a Rust helper with explicit Result-based error handling and real cargo test coverage.
instructions: Define a Holding struct with symbol: String and quantity: u32.
Implement pub fn parse_holding(input: &str) -> Result<Holding, String>.
Trim whitespace, uppercase the symbol, reject empty symbols, reject missing colon, and reject invalid quantities.
Do not use unwrap or expect.
